package rulecoverage

func PositiveStringFormatForErrorWrap() string {
    ruleID := "string_format_for_error_wrap"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "warning"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "`fmt.Errorf(\"failed: %s\", err.Error())` where `%s` on `err.Error()` is used instead of `%w` on `err`"
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
